# Postal and Copy Plus

> A locally owned pack-and-ship, printing, and business-services center.
> Pack. Ship. Print. Notarize. All in one place.

## Services
- Shipping with USPS, UPS, FedEx, and DHL (domestic & international)
- Packing supplies and custom packing for fragile items
- Printing & copies (color/B&W), banners, binding, lamination
- Notary Public (on-site, no appointment needed)
- Private mailbox rental with package acceptance
- Passport & ID photos
- Fax & document scanning
- Stamps, postage, and money orders

## Contact
- Website: https://www.postalandcopyplus.com/
- Phone: «(000) 000-0000»  <!-- update in /config.js -->
- Address: «123 Main Street, City, ST 00000»  <!-- update in /config.js -->

## Notes
This site is a single-page storefront. All business details (hours, address,
phone, services) are maintained in /config.js as the single source of truth.
